description:
Purpose: make the V3 DSL canonical before validating features.

Done when:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: E1 complete: V3 agent entrypoint, tools/actions, result contracts, controls, conditional operation controls, cleanup of legacy parser support, validation coverage, generated helper alignment, and formatter support are implemented and verified.

title: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation
